title: Venezuelan Crumble Crisp
description: A sweet and crunchy dessert that combines the best of Venezuelan and American classics.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan vanilla crema
ingredients.notes: Available at Latin American grocery stores

instructions: In a small bowl, mix together cookie crumbs and sugar.
In a separate bowl, melt the butter and mix with crumble mixture.
In a 9x9 inch baking dish, layer the vanilla ice cream and crema mixture.
Top with crumble mixture and then sprinkle with cookie crumb mixture.
Bake for 25-30 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm with additional crema if desired.
